hero.title: Skyguard
hero.description: Skyguard JS is a lightweight dependency-free framework written in TypeScript to build APIs and web servers.

features.heading: Framework strengths
features.description: A modern base to build web servers and APIs with a focus on simplicity, performance, and control.

items.title: Lightweight
items.description: Designed to stay small, fast, and easy to integrate into any backend project.

items.title: Dependency-free
items.description: Lower complexity, more control, and a more stable base to build your server.

items.title: TypeScript first
items.description: Static typing, autocomplete, and a modern developer experience from the start.

items.title: Great for APIs
items.description: A clear and direct base to build APIs and web servers with a simple architecture.

items.title: Solid architecture
items.description: Focus on internal clarity, maintainability, and long-term framework organization.

runtimes.heading: Run Anywhere
runtimes.description: Skyguard works seamlessly across the main JavaScript runtimes.
runtimes.slogan: Same API, same developer experience, everywhere

items.title: Confidence through safe typing

points.title: Eliminate runtime errors
points.description: Catch common issues at compile time with strict TypeScript types and predictable contracts.

points.title: Simplify API contracts
points.description: Define expected inputs and outputs clearly so every endpoint is documented by design.

points.title: Refactor without friction
points.description: Evolve your code safely while the type system immediately highlights impacted paths.

items.title: Built-in validation

points.title: No dependency installs
points.description: Validates incoming requests with built-in schemas without installing third-party dependencies.

points.title: Detailed validation
points.description: Get explicit messages for invalid payloads and validate request structures precisely.

points.title: Smooth integration
points.description: Apply validation at route level so handlers stay clean and readable.

items.title: Dependency-free

points.title: Everything included
points.description: No third-party packages required, the framework includes everything needed to build APIs.

points.title: Attack protection
points.description: Built-in protections like CSRF, rate limiting, CORS, encryption, and password hashing.

cta.title: Ready to build faster?
cta.description: Go from docs to your first Skyguard JS project. Discover the next generation of TypeScript-powered web development.
